title: ALP Swarm Object
description: Declares a networked swarm: a set of ALP nodes coordinating through a shared coordinator (an `alp serve` instance). Introduced in ALP v4 (The Federation Era, Pillar 1).

coordinator.description: Base URL of the `alp serve` coordinator. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:4000.

token.description: Shared bearer token for the coordinator (if it requires one). May reference an env var via ${NAME}.

node_id.description: This node's name. Auto-generated if omitted.

heartbeat_seconds.description: How often to report liveness to the coordinator. Default 5.

pull_state.description: Pull merged task state from the coordinator before each claim. Default true.

peers.description: Known peer coordinator URLs for gossip/roster.
